latency_us_by_shape.<sid>: REQUIRED: measured latency (us) for EVERY shape in the workspace shapes.json (the full shape set). Keyed by the integer sid ('0','1',...) shared with shapes.json and roofline.json. latency_us above = mean of these. NEVER bench only one representative shape.

performance.priority_ms: mean over sids of max(0, latency_ms - SOL_ms), where SOL_ms = roofline.json.shapes[sid].sol_time_ms (plain per-shape number, no platform key) — the boundary's reachable savings toward the single layer SOL-score; the orchestrator ranks boundaries by this.

optimization.risks_and_rollback: <why it might fail and rollback plan>

open_directions.direction: <candidate optimization lever for the NEXT session to try, most-promising first; max 3>
open_directions.rationale: <evidence/intuition for why this is promising, incl. unfinished-but-promising threads>
